CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayPopFront(values) AS res FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayPopFront(values) AS res FROM test_array WHERE values != [];
SELECT id, arrayPopFront(arrayPopFront(values)) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arrayPopFront(values) AS res FROM (SELECT values FROM test_array WHERE id = 2) AS subquery;
SELECT id, arrayPopFront(arrayMap(x -> x * 2, values)) AS res FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arrayPopFront(arrayConcat(values, [100])) AS res FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE test_array_join (group_id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT t1.id, arrayPopFront(t2.values) AS res FROM test_array AS t1 JOIN test_array_join AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.group_id WHERE t1.id = 1;
SELECT arrayPopFront(arrayJoin(values)) AS first_value FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arrayPopFront(arraySelect(x, values)) AS res FROM test_array JOIN (SELECT 1 AS x) AS x_table ON test_array.id = x_table.x;
